div.class: max-w-8xl mx-auto
admin divide-x divide-dashed divide-gray-100 flex flex-wrap

button.class: animate__animated animate__fadeIn inline-flex items-center border gap-2 border-transparent bg-midnight-blue px-4 py-3 text-base font-medium text-white shadow-sm hover:bg-ocean focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-ocean focus:ring-offset-2
